apps.purpose_en: Safety warning and operating information for the radiator and cooling system; withstands high heat and coolant.
apps.purpose_zh: 散热器及冷却系统的安全警示与操作信息标识，耐高温冷却液。
apps.risk_en: Labels dropping off at high heat lose the safety warning; coolant corrosion smears the print; technician mis-operation causes safety incidents.
apps.risk_zh: 高温脱落导致安全警示丢失、冷却液腐蚀脱墨、维修人员误操作引发安全事故。
apps.challenge_en: Continuous high heat, coolant corrosion, humidity, engine-bay chemical attack
apps.challenge_zh: 持续高温环境、冷却液腐蚀、潮湿、发动机舱化学品侵蚀

products.feature_en: White gloss polyester + medium-high-tack acrylic + heat-resistant topcoat
products.feature_zh: 白色光面聚酯基材+中高粘丙烯酸胶+耐温顶涂层
products.benefit_en: Withstands engine-bay heat and humidity; resists coolant without lifting; warning stays legible long-term
products.benefit_zh: 耐发动机舱高温高湿、耐冷却液不脱落、警示信息长期清晰可读
products.spec_en: Facestock: 2mil white gloss PET · Adhesive: medium-high-tack acrylic · Temp: -40~150℃ · coolant-resistant · UL
products.spec_zh: 基材:2mil白色光面聚酯PET;胶层:中高粘丙烯酸;耐温:-40~150℃;耐冷却液;UL认证

apps.purpose_en: Automotive battery identification, safety warning and service information; resists acids/alkalis and heat cycling.
apps.purpose_zh: 汽车蓄电池标识、安全警示及维保信息标签，耐酸碱及热循环。
apps.risk_en: Electrolyte corrosion causes drop-off; adhesive fails under heat cycling; loss of battery traceability affects after-sales and recall.
apps.risk_zh: 电解液腐蚀脱落、热循环胶失效、电池追溯丢失影响售后与召回。
apps.challenge_en: Wide battery thermal-cycling swings, electrolyte corrosion, high durability demand, low-surface-energy battery casing
apps.challenge_zh: 电池热循环温差大、电解液腐蚀、高耐久性要求、电池外壳低表面能

products.feature_en: White gloss polyester + chemical-resistant acrylic + high-durability formula
products.feature_zh: 白色光面聚酯+耐化学丙烯酸胶+高耐久性配方
products.benefit_en: No edge-lift through battery heat cycling; resists electrolyte corrosion; identification stays clear over full battery life
products.benefit_zh: 耐电池热循环不翘边、耐电解液腐蚀、电池全寿命标识清晰
products.spec_en: Facestock: 2mil white gloss PET · Adhesive: medium-high-tack chemical-resistant acrylic · Temp: -40~125℃ · acid/alkali-resistant · UL
products.spec_zh: 基材:2mil白色光面聚酯PET;胶层:中高粘耐化学丙烯酸;耐温:-40~125℃;耐酸碱;UL认证

apps.purpose_en: Identification and maintenance information for power-steering and fluid reservoirs; resists engine oil and hydraulic fluid.
apps.purpose_zh: 动力转向及各类油液储液罐的标识与维护信息，耐机油液压油。
apps.risk_en: Oil penetration fails the adhesive and drops the label; curved-surface edge-lift; mixed-up fluid labels cause wrong fill and faults.
apps.risk_zh: 油污渗透胶失效脱落、曲面翘边、油液标识混淆加错油引发故障。
apps.challenge_en: Oil seepage, chemical contact, low-surface-energy curved application, oil resistance
apps.challenge_zh: 机油油污渗透、化学品接触、低表面能曲面贴附、耐油

products.feature_en: Silver matte polyester + ultra-high-tack oil-resistant acrylic + conformable
products.feature_zh: 银色哑光聚酯+超高粘耐油丙烯酸胶+曲面适配
products.benefit_en: Resists engine/hydraulic oil without swelling; conforms to curves without lifting; durable in oily environments
products.benefit_zh: 耐机油液压油不溶胀、曲面贴附不翘边、油液环境标识持久
products.spec_en: Facestock: 2mil silver matte PET · Adhesive: ultra-high-tack oil-resistant acrylic · Temp: -40~120℃ · oil/hydraulic-fluid-resistant
products.spec_zh: 基材:2mil银色哑光聚酯PET;胶层:超高粘耐油丙烯酸;耐温:-40~120℃;耐机油液压油

apps.purpose_en: Permanent VIN identification for whole-vehicle traceability and regulatory compliance; tamper- and tear-evident.
apps.purpose_zh: 车辆识别码VIN永久性标识，整车追溯与法规合规，防篡改防撕毁。
apps.risk_en: A tampered label voids vehicle traceability; a worn VIN becomes unreadable; failing regulatory compliance.
apps.risk_zh: 标签被篡改车辆追溯失效、磨损后VIN不可读、法规合规不通过。
apps.challenge_en: Long-term outdoor durability, abrasion and scratch resistance, chemical resistance, tamper- and counterfeit-proofing
apps.challenge_zh: 长期户外耐久性、耐磨耐刮、耐化学品、防篡改防伪

products.feature_en: Laser-markable acrylic facestock + high-strength chemical-resistant adhesive + destructible structure
products.feature_zh: 激光打标丙烯酸基材+高强度耐化学胶+防撕毁结构
products.benefit_en: Laser marking is permanent and non-erasable; chemical- and abrasion-resistant; tamper-evident to meet regulations
products.benefit_zh: 激光打标永久不可擦除、耐化学耐磨损、防篡改满足法规要求
products.spec_en: Facestock: black matte / white acrylic · Adhesive: high-strength chemical-resistant acrylic · Temp: -40~150℃ · laser-markable · tamper-evident
products.spec_zh: 基材:黑色哑光/白色丙烯酸;胶层:高强度耐化学丙烯酸;耐温:-40~150℃;激光打标;防篡改

apps.purpose_en: Tire-pressure and vehicle-load information at the door jamb; readable outdoors long-term.
apps.purpose_zh: 车门立柱处轮胎气压及车辆载荷信息标识，长期户外可读。
apps.risk_en: UV ageing fades the label; adhesive fails under temperature cycling; loss of tire-pressure info affects driving safety.
apps.risk_zh: 紫外线老化褪色、温变胶失效、胎压信息丢失影响行车安全。
apps.challenge_en: Long-term outdoor exposure, thermal-cycling resistance, UV resistance, permanently legible data
apps.challenge_zh: 长期户外环境暴露、耐温变、耐紫外线、信息永久可读

products.feature_en: White gloss polyester + weather-resistant acrylic + UV-stable coating
products.feature_zh: 白色光面聚酯+耐候丙烯酸胶+UV稳定涂层
products.benefit_en: No fading under outdoor UV; no drop-off through temperature cycling; pressure info stays clear long-term
products.benefit_zh: 耐户外紫外线不褪色、温变循环不脱落、胎压信息长期清晰
products.spec_en: Facestock: 2mil white gloss PET · Adhesive: medium-high-tack weather-resistant acrylic · Temp: -40~125℃ · UV-resistant · UL
products.spec_zh: 基材:2mil白色光面聚酯PET;胶层:中高粘耐候丙烯酸;耐温:-40~125℃;耐UV;UL认证

apps.purpose_en: Information, safety warning and service identification for battery cells and modules; resists temperature cycling and chemicals.
apps.purpose_zh: 电池单体及模组的信息、安全警示与服务标识，耐温变耐化学。
apps.risk_en: Adhesive fails and drops off under heat cycling; chemical corrosion smears print; battery-module traceability breaks.
apps.risk_zh: 热循环胶失效脱落、化学腐蚀脱墨、电池模组追溯中断。
apps.challenge_en: Wide thermal-cycling swings, chemical contact, high durability demand, module traceability
apps.challenge_zh: 热循环温差大、化学品接触、高耐久性要求、模组追溯

products.feature_en: White gloss polyester + chemical-resistant acrylic + high-durability formula
products.feature_zh: 白色光面聚酯+耐化学丙烯酸胶+高耐久配方
products.benefit_en: Withstands battery heat cycling; resists electrolyte corrosion; reliable identification across the full battery lifecycle
products.benefit_zh: 耐电池热循环、耐电解液腐蚀、电池全生命周期标识可靠
products.spec_en: Facestock: 2mil white gloss PET · Adhesive: medium-high-tack chemical-resistant acrylic · Temp: -40~125℃ · acid/alkali-resistant
products.spec_zh: 基材:2mil白色光面聚酯PET;胶层:中高粘耐化学丙烯酸;耐温:-40~125℃;耐酸碱

apps.purpose_en: Small-format identification and traceability for automotive electrical components, harnesses and connectors; precise application.
apps.purpose_zh: 汽车电气元件、线束、连接器的小尺寸标识与追溯，精密贴附。
apps.risk_en: Small labels print unclearly; edge-lift on component curves; loss of electrical traceability hampers repair.
apps.risk_zh: 小标签打印不清、元件曲面翘边、电气追溯丢失影响维修。
apps.challenge_en: Small-format curved application, durability demand, barcode readability, densely packed components
apps.challenge_zh: 小尺寸曲面贴附、耐久性要求、条码可读性、元件密集空间

products.feature_en: Heat-resistant PET film facestock + standard high-temperature adhesive + ultra-thin construction
products.feature_zh: 耐高温PET薄膜基材+标准高温胶+超薄结构
products.benefit_en: Stable in high-heat environments; precise application on small formats; component traceability stays legible
products.benefit_zh: 耐高温环境稳定、小尺寸精密贴附、电气元件追溯清晰可读
products.spec_en: Facestock: heat-resistant PET film · Adhesive: high-temperature acrylic · Temp: -40~180℃ short-term · ultra-thin
products.spec_zh: 基材:耐高温PET薄膜;胶层:高温丙烯酸;耐温:-40~180℃短期;超薄

apps.purpose_en: Operating instructions and safety warnings at the fuel filler; resists fuel chemicals and applies to curved surfaces.
apps.purpose_zh: 燃油加注口操作说明与安全警示标签，耐燃油化学品曲面贴附。
apps.risk_en: Fuel dissolves the adhesive and drops the label; curved-surface edge-lift; wrong filling causes safety incidents.
apps.risk_zh: 燃油溶解胶层脱落、曲面翘边、加注错误引发安全事故。
apps.challenge_en: Fuel-chemical corrosion, humid environment, curved-surface conformance, long-term outdoor exposure
apps.challenge_zh: 燃油化学品腐蚀、潮湿环境、曲面贴附适配、长期户外

products.feature_en: Silver matte polyester + high-tack flexible acrylic + conformable
products.feature_zh: 银色哑光聚酯+高粘柔性丙烯酸胶+曲面适配
products.benefit_en: Resists fuel chemicals; conforms to curves without lifting; filler identification stays clear and durable
products.benefit_zh: 耐燃油化学品、曲面贴附不翘边、加注口标识持久清晰
products.spec_en: Facestock: 2mil silver matte PET · Adhesive: high-tack flexible acrylic · Temp: -40~120℃ · fuel-resistant · conformable
products.spec_zh: 基材:2mil银色哑光聚酯PET;胶层:高粘柔性丙烯酸;耐温:-40~120℃;耐燃油;曲面适配

apps.purpose_en: Operating instructions and safety information at the EV charging port; resists outdoor exposure and chemicals.
apps.purpose_zh: 电动汽车充电口操作说明与安全信息标识，耐户外耐化学。
apps.risk_en: Outdoor ageing fades the label; chemical corrosion smears print; loss of charging-safety info causes incidents.
apps.risk_zh: 户外老化褪色、化学腐蚀脱墨、充电安全信息丢失引发事故。
apps.challenge_en: Outdoor sun and rain, chemical contact, long-term readability, EV/new-energy compliance
apps.challenge_zh: 户外日晒雨淋、化学品接触、长期可读性、新能源合规

products.feature_en: White gloss polyester + weather-resistant acrylic + UV-stable topcoat
products.feature_zh: 白色光面聚酯+耐候丙烯酸胶+UV稳定顶涂层
products.benefit_en: All-weather outdoor durability; resists charging-port chemicals; EV identification stays clear and compliant long-term
products.benefit_zh: 耐户外全气候、耐充电口化学品、新能源标识长期清晰合规
products.spec_en: Facestock: 2mil white gloss PET · Adhesive: medium-high-tack weather-resistant acrylic · Temp: -40~150℃ · UV/weather-resistant
products.spec_zh: 基材:2mil白色光面聚酯PET;胶层:中高粘耐候丙烯酸;耐温:-40~150℃;耐UV耐候

apps.purpose_en: Identification and traceability for exterior vehicle components; all-weather, UV- and abrasion-resistant.
apps.purpose_zh: 汽车外部零部件的标识与追溯，耐全气候紫外线耐磨。
apps.risk_en: UV ageing chalks and drops the label; grit abrasion makes it unreadable; exterior-part traceability is lost.
apps.risk_zh: UV老化粉化脱落、砂石磨损不可读、外饰件追溯丢失。
apps.challenge_en: UV ageing, wind and rain, gravel abrasion, long-term outdoor durability
apps.challenge_zh: 紫外线老化、风吹雨淋、砂石磨损、户外长期耐久性

products.feature_en: White gloss polyester + weather-resistant acrylic + UV anti-ageing coating
products.feature_zh: 白色光面聚酯+耐候丙烯酸胶+UV抗老化涂层
products.benefit_en: All-weather resistance without chalking; withstands grit abrasion; full-life traceability for exterior parts
products.benefit_zh: 全气候耐候不粉化、耐砂石磨损、外饰件全寿命追溯
products.spec_en: Facestock: 2mil white gloss PET · Adhesive: medium-high-tack weather-resistant acrylic · Temp: -40~150℃ · UV/weather-resistant
products.spec_zh: 基材:2mil白色光面聚酯PET;胶层:中高粘耐候丙烯酸;耐温:-40~150℃;耐UV;耐候

apps.purpose_en: Safety identification and warning information for the airbag module; heat-ageing resistant, interior-grade.
apps.purpose_zh: 安全气囊模块的安全标识与警示信息，耐热老化内饰级。
apps.risk_en: Heat-ageing drop-off; poor appearance; loss of the safety warning affects correct airbag use.
apps.risk_zh: 热老化脱落、外观不良、安全警示丢失影响气囊正确使用。
apps.challenge_en: Interior heat-ageing, high cosmetic standard, low-surface-energy plastic application, safety compliance
apps.challenge_zh: 内饰高温老化、外观要求高、低表面能塑料贴附、安全合规

products.feature_en: White gloss polyester + interior-grade standard acrylic + low-glare surface
products.feature_zh: 白色光面聚酯+内饰级标准丙烯酸胶+低反光表面
products.benefit_en: Resists interior heat-ageing; flat and clean appearance; airbag safety info stays clear long-term
products.benefit_zh: 内饰耐热老化、外观平整美观、气囊安全信息长期清晰
products.spec_en: Facestock: 2mil white gloss PET · Adhesive: standard interior acrylic · Temp: -40~110℃ · interior-grade
products.spec_zh: 基材:2mil白色光面聚酯PET;胶层:标准内饰丙烯酸;耐温:-40~110℃;内饰级

apps.purpose_en: Safety warning and operating instructions on the sun visor; interior-grade, ageing-resistant, lays flat.
apps.purpose_zh: 遮阳板处安全警示与操作说明标识，内饰级耐老化平整。
apps.risk_en: Sunlight ageing; edge-lift spoils appearance; warning info fades and becomes unreadable.
apps.risk_zh: 阳光照射老化、翘边影响外观、警示信息褪色不可读。
apps.challenge_en: High interior cosmetic standard, flat application, heat-ageing resistance, direct sunlight
apps.challenge_zh: 内饰外观要求高、平整贴附、耐热老化、阳光直射

products.feature_en: White gloss polyester + interior standard acrylic + flat surface
products.feature_zh: 白色光面聚酯+内饰标准丙烯酸胶+平整表面
products.benefit_en: Flat, clean interior appearance; resists sunlight ageing; sun-visor warning stays clear long-term
products.benefit_zh: 内饰平整美观、耐阳光老化、遮阳板警示信息长期清晰
products.spec_en: Facestock: 2mil white gloss PET · Adhesive: standard interior acrylic · Temp: -40~110℃ · interior-grade
products.spec_zh: 基材:2mil白色光面聚酯PET;胶层:标准内饰丙烯酸;耐温:-40~110℃;内饰级

apps.purpose_en: Component identification for automotive carpet and interior textiles; bonds to fabric surfaces.
apps.purpose_zh: 汽车地毯及内饰纺织件的零部件标识，织物表面贴附。
apps.risk_en: Drop-off from fabric surfaces; label damaged when flexed; component traceability lost.
apps.risk_zh: 织物表面脱落、弯折标签损坏、零部件追溯丢失。
apps.challenge_en: Textile-surface bonding, flexible bending, interior-environment durability
apps.challenge_zh: 纺织物表面粘接、柔性弯折、内饰环境耐久性

products.feature_en: White matte polyester + flexible textile acrylic + low-modulus construction
products.feature_zh: 白色哑光聚酯+柔性纺织物丙烯酸胶+低模量结构
products.benefit_en: Strong bond to fabric without peeling; flexes without cracking; reliable traceability for carpet parts
products.benefit_zh: 纺织物表面强粘不掉、柔性耐弯折、地毯零部件追溯可靠
products.spec_en: Facestock: white matte polyester · Adhesive: flexible textile acrylic · Temp: -40~100℃ · fabric-compatible
products.spec_zh: 基材:聚酯白色哑光;胶层:柔性纺织物丙烯酸;耐温:-40~100℃;织物适配

apps.purpose_en: Identification for flexible automotive parts; withstands repeated flexing and bending deformation.
apps.purpose_zh: 汽车柔性零部件的标识，耐反复弯折弯曲变形。
apps.risk_en: Flex-fatigue cracking; edge-lift under surface deformation; traceability of flexible parts breaks.
apps.risk_zh: 弯折疲劳脆裂、曲面变形翘边、柔性件追溯中断。
apps.challenge_en: Repeated flex fatigue, curved deformation, varied substrate surfaces, compact size
apps.challenge_zh: 反复弯折疲劳、曲面变形、多种基材表面、尺寸小巧

products.feature_en: White matte polyester facestock + low-modulus flexible acrylic + high-elongation construction
products.feature_zh: 白色哑光聚酯基材+低模量柔性丙烯酸胶+高延展结构
products.benefit_en: High elongation for repeated flexing; deforms with the part without cracking; durable traceability for flexible parts
products.benefit_zh: 高延展耐反复弯折、随部件变形不裂、柔性零部件追溯持久
products.spec_en: Facestock: white matte polyester · Adhesive: low-modulus flexible acrylic · Temp: -40~100℃ · high-elongation
products.spec_zh: 基材:聚酯白色哑光;胶层:低模量柔性丙烯酸;耐温:-40~100℃;高延展性

apps.purpose_en: Pre-printed barcode labels applied to green tires during tire building; stay readable through high-temperature, high-pressure vulcanization for production traceability.
apps.purpose_zh: 轮胎成型工序中贴附于生胎的预制条码标签，经高温高压硫化后保持可读，用于生产追溯。
apps.risk_en: Barcode smears after vulcanization; poor bond to the green-rubber surface; edge-lift during vulcanization breaks traceability.
apps.risk_zh: 硫化后条码糊掉、生胶面贴附不良、硫化过程翘边导致追溯中断。
apps.challenge_en: Extreme vulcanization heat and pressure, tacky green-rubber surface, varied compound formulations, vulcanization-chemical contact
apps.challenge_zh: 硫化极端高温高压、生胶粘性表面、胶料成分差异、硫化化学品接触

products.feature_en: Heat-stabilized pre-cure construction + high-temperature acrylic + vulcanization-validated formula
products.feature_zh: 热稳定预硫化结构+耐高温丙烯酸胶+硫化验证配方
products.benefit_en: Barcode remains readable after high-temp/high-pressure vulcanization; reliable bond on green rubber; full-process tire traceability
products.benefit_zh: 经硫化高温高压后条码仍可读、生胶面可靠贴附、轮胎全工序追溯
products.spec_en: Facestock: heat-stabilized polyester · Adhesive: vulcanization-grade high-temperature acrylic · Vulcanization: 180℃ high-pressure · green-rubber-compatible
products.spec_zh: 基材:热稳定聚酯;胶层:硫化级耐高温丙烯酸;耐硫化:180℃高压;生胶适配

products.feature_en: Heat-stabilized pre-cure construction + high-temperature acrylic + vulcanization-validated formula
products.feature_zh: 热稳定预硫化结构+耐高温丙烯酸胶+硫化验证配方
products.benefit_en: Barcode remains readable after high-temp/high-pressure vulcanization; reliable bond on green rubber; full-process tire traceability
products.benefit_zh: 经硫化高温高压后条码仍可读、生胶面可靠贴附、轮胎全工序追溯
products.spec_en: Facestock: heat-stabilized polyester · Adhesive: vulcanization-grade high-temperature acrylic · Vulcanization: 180℃ high-pressure · green-rubber-compatible
products.spec_zh: 基材:热稳定聚酯;胶层:硫化级耐高温丙烯酸;耐硫化:180℃高压;生胶适配
